roots.name: Japanese UX Storyboard Illustration
roots.description: Japanese UX/service storyboard image-generation style: flat vector, service-design presentation rhythm, emotional user journey panels.

roots.name: Primitive Observational Ink Doodle
roots.description: Reusable primitive observational doodle styles, including childlike reconstruction, animal-character variants, and silhouette reduction.

roots.name: Obscure Japanese Regional Tourism Poster
roots.description: Postwar Japanese regional tourism poster style with memory-based composition, unsophisticated charm, and local publication texture.

roots.name: Flat Vector / Paper-Cut Reduction
roots.description: No-outline flat vector and paper-cut landscape reduction styles using large shapes, limited palettes, and simplified spatial structure.

roots.name: Minimalist Conceptual Diagram / UX Sketch
roots.description: Minimal hand-drawn conceptual diagram style for systems, UX, philosophy, and explanatory image generation.

roots.name: Editorial Cover / Abstract Visual Systems
roots.description: Reusable editorial cover systems: cultural magazine covers, literary landscapes, folk silhouettes, and abstract wide banners.

roots.name: Logo / Typography / Letterform
roots.description: Reusable visual prompt styles for typographic and letterform image generation.

roots.name: Rounded Hand-Drawn Friendly Illustration
roots.description: Compact rounded hand-drawn illustration style with uneven lines, bright simple colors, and friendly handmade characters.

roots.name: Handwritten Photo Annotation
roots.description: Photo annotation image style using thin hand-drawn white lines, arrows, diary-like Japanese comments, and relaxed editorial marks.

prompts.title: Create a Japanese UX service storyboard illustration in a modern flat vector presentation style.
prompts.body:
Create a Japanese UX service storyboard illustration in a modern flat vector presentation style.

The composition should resemble a startup/service-design presentation slide used by Japanese UX consultancies between 2019–2024.

STYLE:
- Minimal flat vector illustration
- White background
- Soft pastel accent colors
- Thin or no outlines
- Rounded simple characters
- Characters are symbolic and emotional rather than detailed
- Simplified facial expressions with dot eyes and tiny mouths
- Friendly but informational
- Calm, trustworthy atmosphere
- Mix of infographic, editorial layout, and storyboard
- Large use of whitespace
- Floating information blocks instead of rigid panels
- Japanese SaaS / healthcare / lifestyle app aesthetic

LAYOUT:
- Explain a service through emotional progression
- Show: user anxiety → service intervention → emotional relief
- Use arrows, floating UI cards, speech bubbles, icons, and mini-scenes
- Include simplified mobile app UI mockups
- Multiple small scenes inside one canvas
- Presentation-slide composition rather than comic panels

TEXT STYLE:
- Soft conversational Japanese tone
- Emotional but understated
- Everyday-life wording
- Avoid aggressive marketing tone

COLOR PALETTE:
- White base
- Desaturated teal, mint, soft blue, light gray
- Minimal number of colors
- Warm and reassuring

ILLUSTRATION STYLE:
- Flat geometric shapes
- No texture
- No realism
- No dramatic shading
- Soft rounded forms
- Modern Japanese explanatory illustration style

MOOD:
- gentle
- reassuring
- emotionally intelligent
- practical
- human-centered
- optimistic but calm

The final image should feel like a service concept storyboard used in a Japanese startup pitch deck or UX strategy presentation.
prompts.sourceConversation: ストーリーボード分析
prompts.notes:
日本UXサービスストーリーボードの汎用マスター。
Layer 1 master prompt retained by 2026-06-28 pruning pass.

prompts.title: Create a 6-panel Japanese UX storyboard manga in a modern flat vector presentation style.
prompts.body:
Create a 6-panel Japanese UX storyboard manga in a modern flat vector presentation style.

The storyboard should visually explain a social/design/service idea through emotional progression and simple narrative scenes.

STRUCTURE:
The storyboard must contain exactly 6 panels arranged in a clean grid layout.

Panel structure:
1. User pain / anxiety
2. Solution idea step 1
3. Solution idea step 2
4. Solution idea step 3
5. Solution idea step 4
6. Ideal future / transformed society

The story should feel like a Japanese startup UX strategy storyboard or service design presentation slide.

STYLE:
- Minimal flat vector illustration
- White or very light warm-gray background
- Soft pastel accent colors
- Thin or no outlines
- Rounded simple characters
- Simplified facial expressions
- Calm and emotionally intelligent atmosphere
- Friendly but analytical
- Modern Japanese SaaS / UX consultancy aesthetic
- Mix of infographic, editorial layout, and storyboard manga
- Large whitespace
- Floating information blocks and icons
- Soft shadows only if minimal
- No realism
- No heavy manga effects
- No dramatic action composition

CHARACTERS:
- 2–4 head-tall simplified human characters
- Symbolic emotional expressions
- Gentle and observational mood
- Everyday clothing
- Characters represent ordinary people, designers, researchers, or citizens

LAYOUT:
- Each panel should contain:
  - a small title/header
  - one main scene
  - supporting UI elements, icons, speech bubbles, arrows, or notes
- Use clean visual hierarchy
- Avoid clutter
- Panels should feel like “UX explanation scenes” rather than entertainment manga

COLOR PALETTE:
- Desaturated teal
- Soft mint green
- Pale blue
- Warm gray
- Muted beige
- Minimal number of colors
- Calm and trustworthy tone

TEXT STYLE:
- Japanese text
- Conversational but thoughtful tone
- Avoid aggressive marketing language
- Slightly intellectual and reflective
- Explain emotional or societal value clearly

MOOD:
- human-centered
- thoughtful
- optimistic but calm
- socially reflective
- quietly hopeful
- culturally grounded

IMPORTANT:
The storyboard should explain:
- a social problem or emotional tension
- how the idea gradually intervenes
- how accumulated small actions create broader societal impact
- a future where humans and systems coexist more meaningfully

TOPIC VARIABLES (replace each time):

[HMW_QUESTION]
= 「ここに課題を書く」

[SOLUTION_IDEA]
= 「ここにアイデアを書く」

[PANEL_1_PAIN]
= 「ユーザーの不安や困りごと」

[PANEL_2]
= 「ソリューション1」

[PANEL_3]
= 「ソリューション2」

[PANEL_4]
= 「ソリューション3」

[PANEL_5]
= 「ソリューション4」

[PANEL_6_FUTURE]
= 「理想的な未来」

The generated storyboard should visually and emotionally express the following:

HMW:
[HMW_QUESTION]

IDEA:
[SOLUTION_IDEA]

Panel details:
1. [PANEL_1_PAIN]
2. [PANEL_2]
3. [PANEL_3]
4. [PANEL_4]
5. [PANEL_5]
6. [PANEL_6_FUTURE]

prompts.title: [HMW_QUESTION]
prompts.body:
[HMW_QUESTION]
= 「ここに課題を書く」

[SOLUTION_IDEA]
= 「ここにソリューションを書く」


Create a 6-panel Japanese UX storyboard manga based on the following challenge and solution idea.

HMW:
[HMW_QUESTION]

SOLUTION:
[SOLUTION_IDEA]


The storyboard should visually explain the emotional journey from social problem to hopeful future through a calm, intelligent, human-centered narrative.

STRUCTURE:
Generate exactly 6 panels in a clean storyboard grid.

Panel flow:
1. User pain / anxiety caused by the problem
2. First interaction with the solution idea
3. Investigating / trying / building the solution
4. Sharing / expanding / operationalizing the solution
5. Accumulated impact / social recognition / proof
6. Ideal future created by the solution

The narrative should naturally infer the details of each panel from the HMW question and solution idea.
Do not require additional panel instructions from the user.

STYLE:
- Japanese startup UX storyboard aesthetic
- Minimal flat vector illustration
- White or soft warm-gray background
- Soft pastel accent colors
- Rounded simple characters
- Thin or no outlines
- Friendly but analytical atmosphere
- Editorial infographic + storyboard manga hybrid
- Calm and emotionally intelligent
- Large whitespace
- Floating information blocks
- Simple icons and UI mockups
- No realism
- No heavy manga action style
- No dramatic perspective

CHARACTERS:
- Simplified 2–4 head-tall human figures
- Symbolic facial expressions
- Ordinary people, designers, citizens, researchers, workers
- Soft emotional nuance rather than exaggerated reactions

LAYOUT:
Each panel should contain:
- Small Japanese title/header
- One main visual scene
- Supporting speech bubbles, arrows, icons, notes, or UI snippets
- Clear visual hierarchy
- Easy-to-understand flow

COLOR PALETTE:
- Desaturated teal
- Soft mint
- Pale blue
- Warm gray
- Muted beige
- Minimal number of colors
- Trustworthy and calm tone

TEXT STYLE:
- Japanese text
- Conversational and reflective
- Slightly intellectual
- Soft emotional tone
- Avoid aggressive advertising language
- Explain emotional and social value clearly

MOOD:
- thoughtful
- human-centered
- socially reflective
- quietly optimistic
- culturally grounded
- practical but hopeful

IMPORTANT:
The storyboard should feel like:
- a Japanese UX consultancy presentation
- a startup pitch storyboard
- a service design concept sheet
- an editorial explanatory manga

The final image should communicate:
- why the problem matters emotionally
- how the solution gradually intervenes
- how small actions accumulate into social value
- how human meaning becomes visible through the process

Inspired by:
Japanese service design storyboards,
editorial infographics,
startup pitch illustrations,
and modern Japanese explanatory manga aesthetics from 2019–2025.

prompts.title: [STYLE THEME]
prompts.body:
[STYLE THEME]
Minimal naïve Japanese doodle illustration / local zine sketch aesthetic / childlike-but-designed symbolic drawing language

Create illustrations in the exact spirit of handmade Japanese marginal doodles found in personal notebooks, local newsletters, tiny independent publications, island community maps, or handwritten signage.

The drawings should feel:
- improvised
- emotionally warm
- slightly awkward
- unintentionally funny
- icon-like
- handmade rather than “illustrated”
- somewhere between children’s drawings and sophisticated graphic reduction

IMPORTANT:
The goal is NOT polished illustration.
The goal is NOT manga.
The goal is NOT modern flat vector branding.
The goal is a strangely balanced mix of:
primitive + observant + symbolic + affectionate.

--------------------------------------------------
[LINE STYLE]
- thick black hand-drawn lines
- visible wobble and instability
- uneven pressure
- slightly dry-brush feeling
- imperfect curves
- occasional asymmetry
- lines should feel quickly drawn in one stroke
- avoid geometric perfection
- avoid clean Bézier curves
- intentionally inconsistent proportions

The linework should resemble:
- marker pen
- brush pen
- cheap felt-tip pen
- casual notebook sketching

--------------------------------------------------
[FORM LANGUAGE]
- extremely simplified shapes
- almost pictogram-level reduction
- rounded silhouettes
- minimal anatomy
- faces made from dots and tiny mouths
- tiny eyes placed far apart
- bodies simplified into blobs, ovals, triangles, or capsules
- animals reduced to “recognizable essence only”
- details omitted aggressively

Every object should feel:
“the minimum amount of information needed to recognize it.”

--------------------------------------------------
[COMPOSITION]
- large empty space
- floating disconnected elements
- uneven spacing
- playful imbalance
- no strict alignment
- awkward placement is GOOD
- visual rhythm should feel accidental but charming

Elements may appear:
- isolated
- partially cropped
- randomly scaled
- casually scattered like notebook margins

--------------------------------------------------
[CHARACTER DESIGN]
Characters should feel:
- innocent
- emotionally neutral
- quietly humorous
- slightly vacant
- unintentionally cute

Expressions:
- tiny smiles
- blank stares
- simple dots
- no dramatic emotion

Avoid:
- expressive anime faces
- dynamic poses
- polished mascot energy

--------------------------------------------------
[OBJECT & ANIMAL RULES]
Animals and objects should be reduced into:
- chunky symbolic silhouettes
- strange but lovable simplifications
- uneven symmetry
- childlike observational abstraction

Examples:
- bird = rounded blob + beak
- turtle = dome + tiny legs
- cat = flat face + whiskers
- flower = symbolic petal cluster
- tree = single irregular mass
- human = bean-shaped body + tiny limbs

--------------------------------------------------
[TEXT STYLE]
If text appears:
- handwritten Japanese
- uneven character size
- casual annotation feeling
- imperfect spacing
- looks written directly beside the doodles

--------------------------------------------------
[TEXTURE]
- monochrome black ink only
- plain white or light gray background
- no gradients
- no shadows
- no realistic texture
- optional slight ink bleed or scan noise

--------------------------------------------------
[OVERALL MOOD]
The image should feel like:
- a personal sketchbook
- a tiny local museum pamphlet
- island community doodles
- notes from a wandering observer
- a handmade visual diary
- playful but not loud
- poetic through simplicity

The humor should emerge naturally from reduction and awkwardness, not from explicit jokes.

--------------------------------------------------
[NEGATIVE PROMPT]
NO:
- polished vector graphics
- corporate illustration
- anime rendering
- realistic anatomy
- detailed shading
- perspective accuracy
- glossy mascot design
- modern UI illustration style
- symmetry perfection
- clean digital curves
- highly expressive cartoon acting
- colorful pop aesthetics
prompts.sourceConversation: AIイラストスタイル再現
prompts.notes:
Minimal naïve Japanese doodle期。後のprimitive observational doodleの前段。
Layer 2 style variation retained under VP-021 by 2026-06-28 pruning pass.

prompts.title: [THEME] Primitive observational ink doodle master
prompts.body:
[THEME] = <SUBJECT>

Create a primitive observational ink doodle of the theme above.

IMPORTANT:
The drawing must feel genuinely clumsy, unresolved, raw, and accidentally expressive.

Do NOT make the illustration:
- polished
- balanced
- elegant
- refined
- clean
- graphically beautiful
- commercially cute
- vector-like
- visually optimized

The image should feel like:
- a notebook marginal doodle
- a rushed observational memo
- a handmade local zine sketch
- an accidental drawing made during field observation
- a badly drawn but strangely perceptive nature sketch

The artist should feel like:
someone who observes nature extremely carefully,
but redraws reality through careless simplification and primitive reconstruction.

The charm comes from:
- awkward proportions
- collapsed forms
- primitive reduction
- asymmetry
- failed anatomy
- unstable silhouette
- accidental imbalance
- uncomfortable spacing
- strange simplification
- rushed execution
- observational sharpness surviving inside bad drawing

The drawing should feel:
“surprisingly observant despite being badly drawn.”

--------------------------------------------------
VERY IMPORTANT STYLE UPDATE

The forms should NOT closely follow real anatomy or realistic outer contours.

Instead:
- reconstruct the object into simplified symbolic masses
- aggressively deform proportions
- compress or stretch parts unnaturally
- simplify curves into blunt awkward shapes
- partially collapse perspective
- redraw the object from memory-like perception rather than accuracy
- allow ugly geometric distortion
- prioritize expressive reconstruction over faithful depiction

The object should feel:
half observation,
half symbolic misunderstanding.

Do NOT preserve clean realistic silhouettes.

--------------------------------------------------
LINE QUALITY

Use:
- bold black ink only
- deep saturated sumi-like black
- thick heavy brush pen strokes
- dramatic thick-to-thin contrast
- areas where ink becomes aggressively black and dense
- occasional overloaded ink blobs
- rough unstable pressure
- trembling curves
- broken awkward contours
- visible brush direction
- slightly dirty ink texture
- scratchy corrections
- uneven stroke rhythm

IMPORTANT:
The thick lines must feel:
- confidently heavy
- blackened with dense ink
- physically loaded with ink
- almost excessive in weight

Avoid:
- excessive dry-brush fading
- overly scratchy full-image texture
- too much distressed erosion
- thin elegant calligraphy
- delicate linework

Some lines may break,
but overall the drawing should still feel visually BLACK and ink-heavy.

The black areas should feel:
wet,
physical,
dense,
and uncontrolled.

--------------------------------------------------
SHAPE LANGUAGE

- extremely simplified forms
- primitive symbolic reduction
- distorted silhouettes
- chunky awkward masses
- flattened perspective
- collapsed anatomy
- minimal information
- strange negative space
- almost pictogram-like abstraction

Observation should remain sharp,
even though the execution feels primitive and partially failed.

The drawing must feel:
“badly drawn by someone with good eyes.”

--------------------------------------------------
COMPOSITION

- isolated floating object
- white background
- awkward placement
- strange empty gaps
- slightly off-center
- accidental notebook composition
- uncomfortable balance is GOOD
- random spacing is GOOD
- avoid poster-like composition
- avoid design-like harmony

--------------------------------------------------
MOOD

- emotionally dry
- unintentionally funny
- slightly lonely
- handmade
- raw
- careless in a good way
- quiet
- observational
- anti-commercial
- non-cute
- non-anime

--------------------------------------------------
TEXT

Include small handwritten Japanese labeling text.

The handwriting should feel:
- uneven
- rushed
- childish
- casually misplaced
- inconsistent in size
- imperfectly spaced

--------------------------------------------------
OUTPUT STYLE

- monochrome black ink on white background
- no color
- no gradients
- no shadows
- no realistic rendering
- no background scenery
- no modern vector aesthetics
- no polished editorial minimalism

--------------------------------------------------
KEYWORDS

primitive observational doodle
raw ink sketch
ugly-cute
awkward handmade drawing
Japanese notebook marginalia
clumsy but observant
badly balanced composition
collapsed silhouette
symbolic reconstruction
deformed natural form
heavy sumi ink
bold overloaded brush strokes
primitive reduction
failed proportions
one-shot drawing
anti-design drawing
dense black ink
handmade field sketch

prompts.title: （ここにモチーフ名を入れる）
prompts.body:
[THEME] = （ここにモチーフ名を入れる）

Create a primitive observational ink doodle of the theme above.

IMPORTANT:
The drawing must feel genuinely clumsy, unresolved, careless, and accidentally expressive.

Do NOT make the illustration:
- polished
- balanced
- elegant
- refined
- commercially cute
- graphically optimized
- anatomically correct
- realistic
- stylish in a modern design sense
- vector-like
- aestheticized

The image should feel like:
- a notebook marginal doodle
- a rushed field memo
- a handmade local zine sketch
- a strange observational scribble
- an accidental character drawing
- a badly drawn but oddly perceptive nature study

The artist should feel like:
someone who observes nature carefully,
but redraws reality through primitive misunderstanding and symbolic reconstruction.

The charm comes from:
- awkward proportions
- failed anatomy
- simplified symbolic masses
- ugly deformation
- collapsed perspective
- strange spacing
- unbalanced composition
- childish reconstruction
- emotionally dry humor
- “wrong” simplification
- blank facial expressions
- primitive visual logic
- accidental funny appearance

VERY IMPORTANT:

Reduce realism aggressively.

The object should NOT preserve realistic anatomy or believable silhouette structure.

Instead:
- reconstruct the subject into blunt symbolic shapes
- simplify curves into awkward geometry
- deform proportions heavily
- stretch or compress body parts unnaturally
- flatten spatial depth
- simplify details almost to pictogram level
- redraw the subject from memory-like misunderstanding
- allow visual stupidity
- prioritize expressive failure over correctness

The result should feel:
half observation,
half symbolic misunderstanding.

The character should feel:
- vacant
- oddly calm
- unintentionally funny
- slightly lonely
- dumb in a charming way
- emotionally flat
- handmade
- anti-commercial

--------------------------------------------------

LINE QUALITY

Use:
- bold black ink only
- deep saturated sumi-like black
- thick brush pen strokes
- dramatic thick-to-thin contrast
- overloaded black ink areas
- visible brush pressure
- uneven curves
- wobbling contours
- scratchy corrections
- inconsistent line rhythm
- heavy dark masses
- occasional ink blobs

IMPORTANT:
The lines must feel:
- physically heavy
- ink-loaded
- confidently crude
- excessive in weight
- handmade and uncontrolled

Avoid:
- delicate calligraphy
- elegant line control
- clean vector curves
- sophisticated illustration finish
- refined brush technique

The drawing should feel visually BLACK and ink-heavy.

--------------------------------------------------

SHAPE LANGUAGE

- primitive reduction
- chunky silhouettes
- pictogram-like abstraction
- strange empty space
- asymmetry
- flat symbolic forms
- collapsed structure
- minimal visual information
- failed but observant simplification

Observation should remain sharp,
even though the drawing feels primitive and partially incorrect.

The drawing must feel like:
“badly drawn by someone with good eyes.”

--------------------------------------------------

COMPOSITION

- isolated floating object
- white background
- awkward placement
- random empty gaps
- slightly off-center
- accidental notebook layout
- uncomfortable balance is GOOD
- avoid poster composition
- avoid graphic design harmony

--------------------------------------------------

TEXT

Include small handwritten Japanese annotation text.

The handwriting should feel:
- rushed
- uneven
- childish
- casually misplaced
- inconsistent in size
- imperfectly spaced
- observational but unnecessary

Examples:
- 「でかい」
- 「よるにとぶ」
- 「たぶんおもい」
- 「めがちいさい」
- 「へんなかたち」

--------------------------------------------------

OUTPUT STYLE

- monochrome black ink on white background
- no color
- no gradients
- no shadows
- no realistic rendering
- no background scenery
- no modern editorial minimalism
- no polished composition
- no clean design aesthetics

--------------------------------------------------

KEYWORDS

primitive observational doodle
raw ink sketch
ugly-cute
awkward handmade drawing
Japanese notebook marginalia
collapsed silhouette
symbolic reconstruction
deformed natural form
failed anatomy
thick sumi ink
overloaded brush strokes
primitive reduction
badly balanced composition
one-shot drawing
anti-design drawing
emotionally flat character
vacant expression
strangely observant doodle
handmade field sketch

prompts.title: [THEME] Bold black observational silhouette reduction
prompts.body:
[THEME] = <SUBJECT>

Create a bold black silhouette illustration of the theme above.

The image should look like a handmade observational sketch that has been aggressively reduced into a single black shape.

IMPORTANT:

Do not create a clean icon.
Do not create a logo.
Do not create a vector graphic.
Do not create a realistic botanical illustration.

Instead, create something between:

- a memory
- a shadow
- a field sketch
- a brush-painted silhouette

The subject should still be recognizable, but only barely.

────────────────────────

VISUAL STYLE

Draw everything using pure black shapes only.

White background.

No color.

No gray.

No shading.

No gradients.

No textures.

No realistic rendering.

No decorative details.

No outlines separate from the filled shape.

The entire drawing should feel like it was painted with a thick brush or marker.

────────────────────────

FORM LANGUAGE

The object should not be carefully constructed.

Instead:

- simplify aggressively
- merge nearby forms together
- lose information intentionally
- remove small details
- distort proportions
- exaggerate characteristic features
- compress visual complexity into a few large masses

The goal is not accuracy.

The goal is recognizability through reduction.

Large shapes should dominate.

Small details should disappear.

────────────────────────

IMPERFECTIONS

Preserve accidental qualities:

- uneven edges
- awkward proportions
- slightly broken contours
- imperfect symmetry
- small gaps inside shapes
- occasional visual ambiguity

The image should feel handmade rather than designed.

It should feel discovered rather than optimized.

────────────────────────

OBSERVATIONAL QUALITY

Although simplified, the drawing must still contain evidence that the artist carefully observed the real subject.

Avoid generic clip-art forms.

Capture only the few structural features that make the subject uniquely identifiable.

Everything else should be discarded.

────────────────────────

COMPOSITION

Single isolated subject.

Centered composition.

Plenty of empty white space around it.

No background.

No ground.

No text.

No labels.

No framing.

The result should resemble a black archaeological stencil, a remembered silhouette, or a field notebook sketch reduced to its essential visual mass.

---

例えば、

**[THEME] = ガジュマル**

にすると、あの特徴的な気根だけが異常に強調された黒い塊になる。

**[THEME] = セマルハコガメ**

にすると、甲羅と首だけが残った妙な黒シルエットになる。

**[THEME] = 那智の滝**

にすると、岩壁と一本の白抜きの滝筋だけが残る。

このスタイル、君が最近よく作っている「primitive observational doodle」とも違っていて、

**"observational silhouette reduction"**
あるいは
**"memory-shadow illustration"**

みたいな系統だと思う。かなり面白いスタイルだね。実際、地域図鑑やフィールドガイドの章扉なんかにすごく相性が良さそう。
prompts.subject: ガジュマル**
prompts.notes:

prompts.title: <SUBJECT>
prompts.body:
[THEME]
= <SUBJECT>

Create a primitive observational ink doodle of the theme above.

IMPORTANT:

The drawing must feel genuinely clumsy,
unresolved,
raw,
and accidentally expressive.

Do NOT make the illustration:

- polished
- balanced
- elegant
- refined
- clean
- graphically beautiful
- commercially cute
- professional
- well-designed
- vector-like
- visually optimized

The goal is NOT artistic quality.

The goal is recognizability through childlike reconstruction.

--------------------------------------------------
CORE CONCEPT

The drawing should feel like:

a curious elementary school child
observing a real object carefully
and trying to record it in a notebook.

The child has:

- strong observational sensitivity
- poor drawing skill
- no design education
- no concern for aesthetics

IMPORTANT:

Do NOT draw like an artist pretending to draw badly.

Draw like someone who is actually bad at drawing.

The child notices important characteristics,
but reconstructs them incorrectly.

Observation is surprisingly accurate.

Execution is not.

--------------------------------------------------
OVERALL FEELING

The image should feel like:

- a notebook margin doodle
- a field observation memo
- a school nature journal
- a handmade local zine sketch
- a rushed observational drawing
- a private visual note
- a memory aid rather than an artwork

The drawing should feel:

"surprisingly observant despite being badly drawn."

--------------------------------------------------
CHILDLIKE RECONSTRUCTION

The object should NOT closely follow:

- realistic anatomy
- realistic perspective
- realistic contours
- realistic proportions

Instead:

- redraw from memory-like perception
- reconstruct forms into simple symbols
- simplify aggressively
- deform freely
- collapse complexity
- compress visual information
- preserve only major recognizable features

Examples of simplification:

- leaves become ovals
- fruits become circles
- flowers become blobs
- branches become sticks
- roots become lines
- foliage becomes floating masses
- textures become random marks

The child often repeats simple symbols
instead of drawing what is actually visible.

--------------------------------------------------
SIMPLIFICATION RULE

When uncertain:

always simplify more.

Always choose:

symbol > realism

memory > accuracy

recognition > anatomy

If a shape can become:

- circle
- oval
- blob
- stick
- rectangle

then reduce it.

Avoid:

- sophisticated structure
- realistic construction
- believable anatomy
- botanical accuracy
- careful rendering

Recognition is enough.

--------------------------------------------------
DRAWING BEHAVIOR

The drawing should feel like:

one attempt

no planning

no corrections

no refinement

no composition strategy

no design intent

The artist simply wants to remember what they saw.

This naturally creates:

- awkward proportions
- uneven density
- strange spacing
- repeated symbols
- accidental charm
- visual mistakes

Preserve these qualities.

--------------------------------------------------
LINE QUALITY

Use:

- bold black ink only
- deep saturated sumi-like black
- thick marker-like strokes
- heavy brush pen feeling
- dramatic thick-to-thin contrast
- dense black areas
- overloaded ink blobs
- rough unstable pressure
- trembling curves
- uneven stroke rhythm
- visible brush direction
- occasional broken lines

IMPORTANT:

The thick lines must feel:

- confidently heavy
- physically loaded with ink
- blackened and dense
- slightly excessive
- handmade

The black areas should feel:

- wet
- physical
- dense
- uncontrolled

Avoid:

- elegant linework
- delicate calligraphy
- polished brushwork
- excessive dry-brush texture
- sophisticated ink painting aesthetics

Overall impression:

BLACK > TEXTURE

--------------------------------------------------
SHAPE LANGUAGE

Use:

- primitive symbolic reduction
- distorted silhouettes
- chunky masses
- flattened perspective
- collapsed anatomy
- minimal information
- awkward negative space
- pictogram-like simplification

The drawing should feel:

half observation

half misunderstanding

--------------------------------------------------
COMPOSITION

Use:

- isolated object
- white background
- off-center placement
- awkward spacing
- strange empty areas
- accidental balance
- notebook page feeling

Avoid:

- poster composition
- graphic design balance
- visual optimization
- aesthetic symmetry

Randomness is good.

Discomfort is good.

--------------------------------------------------
MOOD

- emotionally dry
- unintentionally funny
- slightly lonely
- quiet
- observational
- handmade
- raw
- anti-commercial
- non-cute
- non-anime

The drawing should feel:

as if nobody expected anyone else to see it.

--------------------------------------------------
TEXT

Include small handwritten Japanese labeling text.

The handwriting should feel:

- uneven
- rushed
- childish
- imperfectly spaced
- inconsistent in size
- casually misplaced

The text should look like a child labeling a nature sketch.

--------------------------------------------------
OUTPUT STYLE

- monochrome black ink on white background
- no color
- no gradients
- no shadows
- no realistic rendering
- no background scenery
- no decorative elements
- no modern vector aesthetics
- no polished editorial minimalism

--------------------------------------------------
FINAL TEST

Before finishing, verify:

Would this look believable if someone said:

"An elementary school child drew this after observing the object for five minutes."

If the answer is no:

simplify more.

Deform more.

Reduce more.

Make it worse.

Keep the observation.

Lose the skill.

--------------------------------------------------
KEYWORDS

elementary school nature observation sketch

childlike field notebook drawing

primitive observational doodle

raw ink sketch

ugly-cute

clumsy but observant

symbolic reconstruction

deformed natural form

collapsed silhouette

failed proportions

one-shot drawing

anti-design drawing

dense black ink

awkward handmade drawing

Japanese notebook marginalia

badly drawn by someone with good eyes
prompts.sourceConversation: 枝分かれ · 枝分かれ · グァバの落書き

prompts.title: Create an illustration in the style of an obscure Japanese regional tourism poster printed between 1955 and 1975.
prompts.body:
Create an illustration in the style of an obscure Japanese regional tourism poster printed between 1955 and 1975.

IMPORTANT:

This must NOT look like contemporary retro design.
This must NOT look like a modern illustrator imitating vintage graphics.

Instead, it should genuinely feel like a forgotten local tourism poster produced by a small prefectural tourism office, museum, hot spring association, or national park bureau in postwar Japan.

The image should feel culturally authentic, slightly unsophisticated, and unintentionally charming.

────────────────────────

DRAWING PHILOSOPHY

Do not draw reality.

Reconstruct reality from memory.

The artist observed the landscape,
waited several days,
then redrew only what remained memorable.

Everything should feel remembered rather than observed.

Objects are reduced to symbols.

Accuracy is sacrificed for recognizability.

The goal is communication, not depiction.

────────────────────────

FORM LANGUAGE

Transform all subjects into simplified graphic symbols.

Rocks become rounded blobs.

Mountains become stacked shapes.

Trees become abstract silhouettes.

Buildings become primitive blocks.

People become tiny marks.

Water becomes large flat fields.

Clouds become decorative cut-paper forms.

Avoid realistic anatomy.

Avoid realistic perspective.

Avoid realistic scale relationships.

Objects may become slightly creature-like or anthropomorphic.

Natural forms should feel halfway between:

folk art,
children's memory,
cartography,
and commercial signage.

────────────────────────

COMPOSITION

Strong poster composition.

Large empty spaces.

Clear visual hierarchy.

Decorative arrangement.

Objects placed for balance rather than realism.

The composition should feel designed by a graphic artist, not a painter.

Allow strange spacing.

Allow asymmetry.

Allow awkward visual rhythms.

Avoid cinematic composition.

Avoid photography-based framing.

────────────────────────

COLOR SYSTEM

Use only 4–7 colors.

Muted mid-century Japanese print palette.

Examples:

turquoise blue
faded vermilion
dusty pink
olive green
warm cream
charcoal black
washed indigo

No modern saturation.

No realistic colors.

Colors are chosen symbolically.

────────────────────────

PRINTING CHARACTERISTICS

Imitate mid-century Japanese silkscreen printing.

Visible color misregistration.

Slightly offset layers.

Soft edge bleeding.

Uneven ink coverage.

Halftone grain.

Paper absorption.

Handmade printing imperfections.

Texture should feel physical.

The image should resemble an old poster found in a local museum archive.

────────────────────────

LINEWORK

Prefer color shapes over outlines.

If outlines exist:

thick,
irregular,
brush-like,
slightly unstable.

Never use clean vector lines.

Never use modern graphic precision.

────────────────────────

DESIGN REFERENCES

Japanese regional tourism posters (1950s–1970s)

National park brochures

Local railway advertisements

Municipal tourism campaigns

Folk craft exhibition posters

Children's educational wall charts

Japanese silkscreen prints

Anonymous commercial illustrators

NOT famous modern graphic designers.

The feeling should be:

provincial,
earnest,
optimistic,
handmade,
slightly awkward,
deeply human.

────────────────────────

EMOTIONAL TONE

The image should feel like:

a memory preserved in ink.

A place described by someone who loved it more than they understood it.

The viewer should feel:

nostalgia,
warmth,
curiosity,
and trust.

────────────────────────

AVOID

photorealism

digital painting

3D rendering

cinematic lighting

modern flat design

minimalist branding

vector illustration

perfect geometry

contemporary retro aesthetics

hipster poster design

advertising polish

Instagram aesthetics

tourism marketing realism

AI-generated perfection
prompts.notes:
obscure Japanese regional tourism poster 1955-1975の中核。
Layer 1 master prompt retained by 2026-06-28 pruning pass.

prompts.title: 入力画像をもとに、モダンでフラットなベクター風イラストに変換してください。
prompts.body:
入力画像をもとに、モダンでフラットなベクター風イラストに変換してください。
これは「写真の再現」ではなく「情報の削減と再構成」を目的とします。
【スタイル要件】
・輪郭線は一切使用しない
・すべての要素を色面のみで構成する
・テクスチャ、ノイズ、細かい陰影は完全に排除する
・グラデーションは禁止（例外的に最大2色まで）
【形状ルール】
・すべてのオブジェクトを幾何学的な大きな形状に再構成する
・1オブジェクトは最大3パーツまで
・細部や文字情報は削除または抽象化する
・「何か分かる最低限」だけ残す
・自然物（草、雲など）はディテールを削除し、大きなシルエットとして扱う
【構造・パターン化ルール】
・繰り返し要素（建築、天井、照明、電線、床、線路など）はパターンとして単純化する
・繰り返し要素は本数・要素数を減らし、均一なリズムに再構成する
・細かい構造は削除し、「リズム」と「配置」だけを残す
【レイヤー構造】
・画面を「前景・中景・後景」の3層に明確に分離する
・各レイヤーは1〜2色のみで構成する
・レイヤー間の明度差を大きく取り、奥行きを表現する
【色彩ルール】
・全体の色数は6〜8色に制限する
・同系色の階調は最大2段階まで
・影はぼかさず、1段階の色面で表現する
・明度差を大きく取り、強いコントラストを作る
・彩度はやや高めに設定する
・地面や道路は単色または2トーンに制限する
【主役・要素の扱い】
・主役（人物・動物・主要オブジェクト）を最も簡潔かつ強い形で表現する
・人物は個人の特徴ではなく、同一ルールで構成された記号として描く
・顔のパーツは最小限（目は点または省略、鼻・口は省略可）
・アクセントとなる要素（標識・看板など）は彩度を上げ、単純な形で強調する
【空間・構図】
・元画像のパースと構図は維持する
・不要な要素は削除し、視線誘導を明確にする
・前景の大きな形（フレームになる要素）は強調する
・空は大きな色面として扱い、構図の主役になり得る場合は優先的に強調する
【削減ルール（重要）】
・要素数を意図的に削減し、最小構成で成立させる
・「描く」のではなく「削って残す」ことを優先する
・情報が多い場合は、意味が通る範囲で大胆に削除する
【禁止事項】
・リアルな再現
・写真の質感の残存
・細かいディテール描写
・複雑なグラデーション
・情報の過剰保持
【出力】
・ポスターとして成立するグラフィック
・抽象度の高いフラットイラスト
・幾何学的でクリーンな印象
この変換は「情報を減らしすぎているかもしれない」と感じるレベルまで削減することを許可する。
prompts.sourceConversation: イラストスタイル提案
prompts.notes:
構造・レイヤー・主役・削減ルールまで含む完全版。
Layer 1 master prompt retained by 2026-06-28 pruning pass.

prompts.title: Create a highly simplified landscape illustration composed of large organic paper-cut shapes.
prompts.body:
Create a highly simplified landscape illustration composed of large organic paper-cut shapes.

Style characteristics:

- flat vector illustration
- no outlines
- no gradients
- no shadows
- no perspective
- no realism
- no texture except subtle paper grain

The landscape should be reconstructed as layered abstract landforms rather than depicted realistically.

Use:

- large flowing hill shapes
- smooth rounded contours
- simplified symbolic objects
- geometric reduction of nature

Integrate decorative textile-like patterns directly into some landforms:

- horizontal stripes
- repeating triangles
- simple woven motifs
- evenly spaced graphic patterns

All patterns should be flat and perfectly integrated into the shapes.

Composition:

- overlapping foreground, middle ground and background hills
- strong asymmetrical balance
- large areas of negative space
- calm and contemplative atmosphere

Objects should be tiny and symbolic:
a bird represented by a simple black silhouette,
a shrine gate represented by a few minimal shapes,
a waterfall represented by a single vertical strip.

Color palette:

muted mustard yellow
sage green
warm beige
soft sky blue
dark charcoal brown

Colors should feel screen-printed rather than digitally rendered.

Avoid:

photorealism,
3D rendering,
lighting effects,
complex detail,
modern corporate illustration,
cartoon style,
hand lettering,
realistic textures.

The final image should resemble an independent Japanese travel postcard, contemporary folk-art print, or handmade screen-printed landscape poster.
prompts.sourceConversation: AI最適化プロンプト生成
prompts.notes:
organic paper-cut landscape。フラットだが別系統として保持。
Layer 1 master prompt retained by 2026-06-28 pruning pass.

prompts.title: Create a minimalist hand-drawn conceptual diagram illustration on a clean white background.
prompts.body:
Create a minimalist hand-drawn conceptual diagram illustration on a clean white background.

The image should feel like a thoughtful research sketch or notebook diagram made by a designer, systems thinker, or UX researcher while developing an idea.

STYLE:

simple black ink line drawing
slightly rough hand-drawn lines
minimal geometric symbols
large white space
sparse composition
quiet intellectual atmosphere
not polished infographic design
not comic style
not cute
not childish
looks like a conceptual whiteboard sketch
subtle imperfection is allowed

TYPOGRAPHY:

small neutral sans-serif English labels
annotation-like captions
Helvetica / Arial / Inter style
understated and explanatory

COMPOSITION:

floating diagram elements
loose spatial organization
connected by arrows, circles, pipes, nodes, and simple symbols
asymmetrical layout
lots of negative space
conceptual rather than decorative

VISUAL LANGUAGE:

simple stick-figure humans
circles for nodes or systems
arrows for information flow
pipes for channels
radiating lines for dimensionality
tiny icons for image/audio/video/text
abstract systems-thinking diagrams

The illustration should feel like:

a designer’s thinking process
a philosophical systems sketch
a UX research notebook
an unfinished but insightful conceptual map

Avoid:

polished corporate infographic aesthetics
bright colors
gradients
thick outlines
realistic rendering
excessive decoration
overly clean vector perfection
prompts.notes:
重複使用が多い安定版。
Layer 1 master prompt retained by 2026-06-28 pruning pass.

prompts.title: Reimagine the uploaded photo as the cover of a sophisticated Japanese cultural lifestyle magazine.
prompts.body:
Reimagine the uploaded photo as the cover of a sophisticated Japanese cultural lifestyle magazine.

The mood should feel intellectual, quiet, observational, and editorial rather than commercial or flashy.

Do not create a typical food magazine.
Instead, treat the image as a fragment of local culture, everyday life, and atmosphere.

Inspired by:
BRUTUS, POPEYE, Casa BRUTUS, TRANSIT, Kinfolk, Apartamento.

Editorial direction

* Minimal and calm layout
* Large negative space
* Very limited headlines
* Typography used as spatial design
* Refined but understated
* Quiet intellectual atmosphere
* Observational rather than promotional
* Avoid commercial magazine aesthetics
* Avoid clutter
* Avoid excessive text

Photo treatment

* Warm tones
* Slightly cinematic
* Slight film grain
* Soft contrast
* Deep shadows
* Slightly desaturated
* Preserve realism and everyday texture
* No HDR look

Typography

* Elegant Japanese typography
* White typography preferred
* Careful kerning and spacing
* Vertical Japanese text elements allowed
* Minimal typography hierarchy
* Sophisticated editorial composition

Composition

* One strong focal image
* Magazine logo placed boldly but calmly
* Plenty of breathing room
* Design should feel curated and intelligent

The final image should feel like a contemporary Japanese independent cultural magazine that values atmosphere, locality, and thoughtfulness.
prompts.notes:
VP-100の短縮/再掲系。差分比較候補。
Layer 1 master prompt retained by 2026-06-28 pruning pass.

prompts.title: Transform the uploaded photograph into a quiet Japanese literary landscape illustration in the style of a modern Japanes
prompts.body:
Transform the uploaded photograph into a quiet Japanese literary landscape illustration in the style of a modern Japanese book cover painting.

The result should NOT feel like a direct photo reproduction.
Instead, reinterpret the scene through simplification, atmospheric compression, and poetic geographical abstraction.

Favor abstraction over realism.
Reduce small objects into symbolic shapes and color masses.

You may freely deform, rearrange, simplify, crop, compress, or reconstruct elements of the original composition in order to create a stronger and more beautiful visual composition.

Focus on:
- geographical mood
- layered spatial rhythm
- quiet atmosphere
- symbolic landforms
- negative space
- poetic balance between abstraction and recognizability

Visual style:
- layered aerial or semi-aerial composition
- overlapping landforms and atmospheric depth
- large simplified color fields
- minimal detail
- compressed visual information
- muted and literary color palette
- calm matte textures
- subtle screenprint or gouache-like surface
- soft print grain
- Japanese nihonga-inspired modern landscape aesthetics
- vintage Japanese literary cover illustration feeling

Color direction:
- muted ultramarine blues
- deep green vegetation
- pale sandy or concrete tones
- hazy blue-gray distance layers
- restrained saturation
- minimal palette

Important:
- No typography
- No title text
- No author names
- No publisher marks
- No UI elements
- No photorealism
- No cinematic lighting
- No HDR
- No excessive detail
- No hard vector outlines
- No glossy rendering

The atmosphere should feel:
silent,
reflective,
nostalgic,
deeply geographical,
and emotionally tied to place memory rather than tourism imagery.

Style references:
Japanese literary book covers,
modern nihonga,
screenprint landscapes,
quiet aerial scenery,
Shinchosha-style cover illustration,
poetic cartographic landscapes.

Slightly uneven ink density and subtle analog print imperfections are welcome.

VP-103のバリエーション。

prompts.title: Create a minimalist Japanese folk-art style editorial illustration composed of small symbolic silhouettes scattered acro
prompts.body:
Create a minimalist Japanese folk-art style editorial illustration composed of small symbolic silhouettes scattered across a textured washi-paper background.

STYLE:
- Japanese folk craft aesthetic
- traditional mimeograph / woodblock print feeling
- rough hand-printed ink texture
- imperfect black ink silhouettes
- visible ink bleeding, scratches, fading, and distressed edges
- asymmetric composition with large negative space
- calm and quiet atmosphere
- highly simplified symbolic forms
- visual language somewhere between pictograms, stencil prints, and natural history catalog illustrations
- no realism
- no gradients
- no glossy digital rendering
- subtle randomness and imperfection

PRINT / MATERIAL:
- printed on warm natural washi paper
- soft beige paper texture with visible fibers
- ink looks slightly absorbed into paper
- vintage local publication feeling
- handcrafted editorial design
- small independent Japanese press aesthetic
- 1970s–1990s Japanese regional culture booklet

COMPOSITION:
- scattered small motifs floating independently
- generous spacing
- asymmetrical layout
- motifs vary slightly in size and orientation
- strong silence and emptiness in composition
- centered vertical Japanese typography area left empty if needed

SHAPE STYLE:
- chunky simplified silhouettes
- primitive cutout-like forms
- occasional accidental gaps and rough edges
- abstracted organic geometry
- slightly playful but restrained

COLOR:
- only black ink on warm beige paper
- monochrome
- muted natural tones

MOOD:
- quiet
- observational
- regional
- editorial
- poetic
- tactile
- humble
- anonymous craft feeling

Avoid:
- modern vector cleanliness
- cute cartoon style
- anime
- photorealism
- polished logo design
- excessive decoration
- strong symmetry
- high contrast digital sharpness
prompts.notes:
和紙・民藝・小シルエット散布のマスター。

prompts.title: [THEME]
prompts.body:
[THEME]

Create an ultra-wide abstract cover image inspired by the theme above.

IMPORTANT:

Do NOT illustrate the theme literally.

Instead, translate the theme into:

- spatial relationships
- emotional atmosphere
- visual rhythm
- density and emptiness
- flow and tension
- layered forms
- color relationships

STYLE:

contemporary abstract editorial cover
high-end design magazine aesthetic
modern art print
minimalist abstract collage
large flat organic shapes
soft geometric forms
overlapping translucent layers
quiet visual tension
generous negative space
subtle depth

VISUAL LANGUAGE:

large irregular color fields
paper-cut collage feeling
floating organic masses
soft-edged polygons
translucent overlapping planes
occasional fine linear gestures
small scattered particle clusters
asymmetrical composition

COMPOSITION:

3000 × 1000 px
ultra-wide panoramic layout

strong horizontal movement

visual weight distributed unevenly

large areas of calm space

elements drifting across the canvas

some forms partially cropped by edges

avoid centered composition

COLOR:

restricted palette

4–7 colors maximum

muted sophisticated tones

museum-quality color relationships

avoid bright saturation

avoid gradients

primarily flat color surfaces

TEXTURE:

subtle paper texture

very soft grain

matte finish

no obvious brush strokes

no realism

no photographic elements

NO:

no people

no objects

no symbols

no icons

no typography

no illustrations

no recognizable scenes

no landscapes

no decorative patterns

The image should feel like:

something meaningful that exists before language,

a thought before it becomes a concept,

a word that has not yet been invented,

a signal waiting to be interpreted.

Theme: [THEME]

prompts.title: Create a single uppercase Latin letter in a custom typographic style based on the following rules.
prompts.body:
Create a single uppercase Latin letter in a custom typographic style based on the following rules.

STYLE CONCEPT:
A sculptural, humanistic sans-serif letterform that feels somewhere between:
- carved wood signage
- stone engraving
- Japanese folk craft aesthetics
- modernist architectural lettering
- handmade editorial typography
- quiet brutalism

The result should feel intentional and refined, NOT playful, cartoonish, or retro.

IMPORTANT:
This is NOT a normal geometric sans-serif font.
The letter must feel slightly irregular, subtly hand-shaped, and constructed as a black mass with white space carved out from it.

STRUCTURE RULES:
- Very thick vertical strokes
- Much thinner horizontal strokes
- Slight inward curvature on vertical stems
- Subtle optical distortion throughout
- Outer silhouette should not be perfectly straight
- Avoid mechanical geometry
- Avoid perfect symmetry
- No sharp precision

TERMINALS:
- Stroke endings are slightly angled
- Do NOT use perfectly horizontal cuts
- Terminal cuts should feel softly hand-trimmed
- Angles are subtle, not dramatic

INNER CORNERS:
- All inner joints and counters use large rounded radii
- Inner negative spaces should feel soft and carved
- Avoid sharp inner corners completely

NEGATIVE SPACE:
- Design the letter as a solid black silhouette first
- Then carve white space from inside
- Prioritize beautiful negative space over strict typographic correctness

PROPORTIONS:
- Slightly condensed width
- Tall and stable presence
- Strong vertical emphasis
- Heavy visual weight
- Quiet monumentality

SURFACE FEEL:
- Flat solid black only
- No outlines
- No gradients
- No textures
- No shadows
- Clean vector-like silhouette

MOOD:
- calm
- restrained
- architectural
- handmade
- slightly primitive
- culturally timeless

OUTPUT:
- Single uppercase Latin letter only
- Centered composition
- White or light neutral background
- High-resolution vector-like appearance
- No additional typography or decoration
prompts.notes:
H書体・人文的サンセリフ字形生成の中核。
Layer 1 master prompt retained by 2026-06-28 pruning pass.

prompts.title: Create a hand-drawn style illustration featuring a [subject, e.g., small delivery truck]. The design should have the fol
prompts.body:
Create a hand-drawn style illustration featuring a [subject, e.g., small delivery truck]. The design should have the following characteristics:
- Compact and rounded proportions, focusing on a cute and friendly look.
- Soft, uneven, hand-drawn lines with noticeable variation in thickness.
- Simple, bright colors with a slightly uneven or textured fill, avoiding sharp gradients or overly polished finishes.
- Add one or two human characters with expressive, lighthearted facial expressions, drawn in a similarly simple and playful style.
- The overall style should feel warm, humorous, and handmade, with minimal background detail.

手描きタクシー風。主流系統と独立。必要なら新root化。

prompts.title: 写真に写っている要素を観察し、それぞれに対して意味のある手描き注釈を追加してください。
prompts.body:
写真に写っている要素を観察し、それぞれに対して意味のある手描き注釈を追加してください。

【写ってるもの】
ここに写真内のアイテムを記入（例：アイスティー、ドーナツ）

【描写ルール】
・白ペンで描いたような細めの手描き線
・一筆書き風でラフ、少し不均一
・オブジェクトの外周をなぞるようにアウトラインを追加
・矢印や点線で視線誘導をつくる

【テキストルール】
・日本語の手書き文字（ひらがな7割、やさしい漢字3割）
・短く、独り言のようなコメントにする
・トーンは「日記・ひとこと・感情寄り」

【コメント生成ルール】
・飲み物 → 味・温度・気分（例：すっきり、やさしい甘さ）
・食べ物 → 食感・おいしさ（例：しっとり、最高）
・空間 → 雰囲気（例：落ち着く、いい時間）
・全体 → 一言まとめ（例：しあわせすぎる〜）

【装飾】
・湯気、キラキラ、ハート、小さな顔文字などを控えめに追加
・やりすぎず「余白」を残す

【仕上がり】
・インスタのストーリー風、雑誌のラフメモ風
・おしゃれで力の抜けた雰囲気
prompts.notes:
写真への手描き注釈スタイル。独立root化候補。
Layer 1 master prompt retained by 2026-06-28 pruning pass.
